mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_zone WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE zone_type WHEN '방사선관리구역' THEN 0 WHEN '방사선작업구역' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, name ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_zone WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_zone WHERE deleted = 0 AND zone_type = #{type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_zone (name, zone_type, location, area_m2, measure_cycle, owner_name, related_source, standard_value, access_rule, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{name}, #{zoneType}, #{location}, #{areaM2}, #{measureCycle}, #{ownerName}, #{relatedSource}, #{standardValue}, #{accessRule}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_zone SET name = #{name}, zone_type = #{zoneType}, location = #{location}, area_m2 = #{areaM2}, measure_cycle = #{measureCycle}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, related_source = #{relatedSource}, standard_value = #{standardValue}, access_rule = #{accessRule}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_zone SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
